CalculateGeometryAttributes LakeEriefreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed "long POINT_X;lat POINT_Y" # # GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] "Same as input"
CalculateField LakeEriefreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed hl_link ""LakeErie-" + str(!OBJECTID!)" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField LakeEriefreshwaterInflowsOutflows_QAQCed hl_link ""LakeErie-" + str(!OBJECTID!)" "Python 3" # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

JoinField LE_InflowsOutflows_conus hl_link conus_nextgen_hydrolocations hl_link poi_id "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField LE_InflowsOutflows_conus poi_id conus_nextgen_pois poi_id id;nex_id "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField LE_InflowsOutflows_conus id conus_nextgen_flowpaths id START_X;START_Y;END_X;END_Y;order "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField LE_InflowsOutflows_conus id conus_nextgen_flowpath_attributes link TopWdth;TopWdthCC "Select transfer fields" #
JoinField LE_InflowsOutflows_conus poi_id conus_nextgen_pois poi_id id;nex_id "Select transfer fields" #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
